description: Canonical Zenith documentation, install flow, editor tooling, and release surfaces.

intro.title: COMPILER TRUTH. PUBLIC SURFACES.
intro.description: The public site now reflects the merged editor and runtime work directly: canonical docs links, visible release notes, verified editor support, and install paths that stay aligned with the current train line.

surfaceCards.title: Editor Integration Contract
surfaceCards.description: Compiler-backed diagnostics, first ZEN-DOM quick fixes, canonical hovers, completions, and the verified VS Code and Neovim paths.

surfaceCards.title: Install Compatibility
surfaceCards.description: Stable and beta install guarantees, scaffolding expectations, and the clean-room contract for create-zenith.

surfaceCards.title: DOM and Environment
surfaceCards.description: Canonical refs, zenWindow, zenDocument, zenOn, zenResize, and collectRefs guidance for authored .zen code.

surfaceCards.title: Release Notes
surfaceCards.description: Site-facing release notes for the merged framework and language-tooling work through v0.6.18.

items.description: Compiler-backed script-boundary and event diagnostics now flow through the language server instead of collapsing into a generic error bucket.
ZEN-DOM-QUERY, ZEN-DOM-LISTENER, and ZEN-DOM-WRAPPER ship first-party quick fixes keyed off stable compiler codes.
Canonical hover and completion entries now cover Zenith primitives plus documented on:* aliases and event attributes.
The bundled VS Code-compatible extension path and direct Neovim LSP path were both verified against the same server behavior.

note.after: remains the public scaffold entry. The docs changelog below records the merged framework and editor batches independently of that install shorthand.
